name: com.chievfx.easy-stateful
description: An easy framework to fast and efficient state creation for UI(and other purposes) with auomatic tweening. Supports any editor. 1. Add StatefulRoot component to your prefab 2. ??? 3. Profit. For overview, consult this boring youtube video: https://youtu.be/6YopeW-5t0I?si=0dNjr8hNqVXgZ57i

samples.description: Basic example showing easy stateful functionality in action

A small living UI built from StatefulRoot widgets — a segmented control with a sliding highlight and a morphing hero, an animated toggle, an expand/collapse card, a slide-in drawer and toast, plus custom uGUI shaders — all driven by button clicks via TweenToState. Shows how to build beautiful, animated UI with just states and one method call.

A polished control window that spawns an adjustable swarm of StatefulRoot objects and fires simultaneous state transitions through them, with live FPS / frame-time readouts so you can measure how the tween engine scales.
